message:
fix: improve click detection clarity and mic mute behavior

input/mod.rs:
- Remove redundant double-click time check that always passed
- The check compared `now` against `last_release_time` which was just set
  to `now`, making it always true. The real timing validation happens via
  `is_continuation` check which uses triple_click_ms
- Added clear comment explaining the timing logic

platform/macos.rs:
- Fix toggle_mic_mute to remember previous volume before muting
- Previously would always restore to hardcoded 50% when unmuting
- Now saves the mic volume before muting and restores it when unmuting
- Uses AtomicI32 for thread-safe state tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
